metadata.title: SYNGO_MF_187
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Expression of channels in Mouse L-cells (fybroblasts).

rule: NAS_MFCC-BP
rationale:
Protein has voltage-gated ion channel activity and is localized in teh presynaptic membrane (show with high-resolution technique). The inference to term 'voltage-gated ion channel activity involved in regulation of presynaptic membrane potential (GO:0099508)' is trivial and non-controversial.
Pinf_CC:
[P10499] SyNGO ID 179 (PMID:14614103, confocal). Experimental description: p.1667: he primary channel chosen for this work was originally cloned from rat brain as RCKl (Baumann et al., 1988) and RBKl (Christie et al., 1989) and from rat aorta as RKl (Roberds and Tamkun, 1991). Under the universal nomenclature (Chandy,1991) this channel is defined as Kvl.1 since it is homologous to the Drosophila Shaker family of K+ channels

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
